meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster, impress clients, and debug like a senior engineer.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors manually. By leveraging AI-first design patterns, you can offload debugging to intelligent agents. Use Antigravity to architect modular systems and Claude Code to perform iterative, context-aware debugging. This workflow transforms your development process from manual trial-and-error into a high-velocity, automated shipping engine for clients.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the deadline is six hours away, and you are staring at a stack trace that makes no sense. Every developer knows the cold sweat of a cryptic error message that refuses to die. It is the silent killer of freelance profitability, turning a high-margin project into a bottomless pit of unpaid hours.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By shifting your perspective from 'writing code' to 'designing with AI,' you flip the script. You no longer need to be the hero who finds every missing semicolon; you become the architect who orchestrates systems that debug themselves. Here is how you reclaim your time and deliver professional-grade code every single time.

steps.title: Architecting for AI-Readiness
steps.description: Before writing code, structure your project so AI tools can easily parse your intent. Use Antigravity to define clear domain boundaries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements. Create a modular architecture plan that separates business logic from UI components to minimize debugging complexity.

steps.title: Automated Context Injection
steps.description: AI needs context to debug effectively. Feed your documentation and style guides into the workspace to ensure consistent outputs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a context file that documents my current coding standards, naming conventions, and preferred library versions for this project.

steps.title: Iterative Error Isolation
steps.description: Don't ask the AI to fix 'everything.' Isolate the specific failing module and request a targeted refactor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Isolate the logic in this module. Identify the root cause of the current runtime error and suggest a defensive coding pattern to prevent recurrence.

steps.title: Automated Test Synthesis
steps.description: Prevent future bugs by having the AI write unit tests for the code it just fixed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the recent fix, generate a comprehensive suite of Jest tests that cover edge cases and ensure stability under load.

steps.title: Systemic Health Review
steps.description: Perform a final pass to ensure your AI-assisted code meets production standards before client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior-level code review of the entire repository. Flag any potential technical debt or performance bottlenecks.

pro_tips: Always include your package.json in the initial context to prevent hallucinated dependency imports.
Use Claude Code's 'review' flag on every PR—it catches logic errors before you even commit.
If an error persists, delete the local cache and have the AI rewrite the function from scratch using a new prompt.
Treat AI prompts like a junior developer: be specific about inputs, outputs, and side effects.
Keep your functions under 20 lines; smaller code blocks result in significantly higher AI debugging accuracy.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin building a library of custom 'Antigravity' prompt templates that you can reuse across all your client projects to standardize your output.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business with AI-powered precision. Don't let bugs dictate your income. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
